hypothesis: The KSG Trading framework (v0.2) executed at >=90% process compliance during Sprint 1 produces positive expected value (positive aggregate R-multiple across all trades)
falsification_criteria: Aggregate R-multiple is <=0 across the sprint AND process compliance was >=90%. If compliance was <90%, the framework wasn't actually tested and the hypothesis remains open.
notes: Primary sprint hypothesis. The entire sprint exists to resolve this.

hypothesis: A-Trades produce materially better R-multiple distribution than non-A-Trades (positive correlation between Trade Quality grade and realized R)
falsification_criteria: After >=30 trades, median R-multiple of A-Trades is not greater than median R-multiple of non-A-Trades
notes: Validates whether the four-grade rubric is actually capturing edge or just measuring compliance
